peak.description: Athlete in the blue tank throws medicine ball directly at the camera
peak.visual_anchor: medicine ball at peak height, approaching the viewer

compilation_notes: Use as an upward motion cut. The blue tank throw is a hype moment to match a strong beat.

peak.description: Athlete powerfully pulls cable on rowing machine, back muscles engaged, determined expression.

compilation_notes: Use the pull motion synced to a beat drop for a high impact moment. Pair with similar pulling motions to create a sense of rhythmic power.

peak.description: Athlete pivots and drives forward, showing determined focus while pushing the weighted sled.
peak.visual_anchor: athlete's focused face and forward drive

compilation_notes: Use for intense forward drive segment in montage; good for syncing with music drops.

peak.description: Athlete brings her weighted leg up and presses on the ball, face showing effort.

compilation_notes: Good for a montage focusing on lower-body strength. Cut on the upward thrust of the leg, possibly pairing with other vertical motions.

peak.description: Group of women intensely move Pilates rings above their heads in synchronized motion during an exercise class at Different Breed Elite Fitness. Faces are straining with effort.

compilation_notes: Use in montage where the peak of movement hits on a beat, great for upward motion flow. Cut-out can show the ring being lowered for recovery or setup for the next movement.
